titleStmt.title: SII 6.1078: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1078. (A.R. No. 336 of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvīrādivīra śrīvīrabhāṇudēvasya pravarddhamāna vijayarājya
saṁvatsaraṁbulu 8 gu śrāhi makara kṛṣṇa 11 yu sanivāramu
nāṁḍu poṭṭunurakaṭakānanu kaḷiṁgaparīkṣa pātraśrīkōṭinātapa
ṁḍāṁkaramāṁji samastabeharaṇa vidyamāne śrīnarasiṁganātha
dēvaṁkara sānusaṁpradāyara naṭṭuvavrittiki kallānirnnaya śilāśā
sana . cittanamokhari Upārjiṁcchina vritti naṭṭuvāpaṇasaṁstuṣṭahōĪ A
rjjihānyāye Ē britti Ehāribaḍubāyimāḍu naṭṭuvabhaḍubha [Ī]
śrīkoḍyāsāni sānubhayiṇi ciṁgāsāni Etaniki Enaṭṭuvābhrittiti
ni bhāgacittanamokhari Arjihānyāye Ehaku Adhikabhāgesa Enēkari
Ehakudu Ī bhāga Epāṁccabhāgaki sabuhajejāharabhage śrahaśrahikhi
ddhibāE . Ehāṁkaramukhari paṇabriti Epaṁcaramadhye jekhadiśeyi śecatu
bartana bhōgakarī bāketaḷarā taṁbrasvamikhana Ehāṁkara bisayakanyā
nyalikhanapātramānasabhu sodisarvva vādisaṁprīti paṇakolāninnayaĒ
hapatraceṁvāsthāĒ sabu hçoĪkhaṭṭibā Etahirasvasatva bā
ṁddhigehapā Ece vasthāku jevā Atikrama killerājavaraku AvarādihçoĪ
tōherabritti AṁsatōṣṇahçoĪ E Artthalābahibevaraṇasākṣi Epāṁ
ccha Ī AṁśyakāIṁka śāsanaṁmmatu . Īnyāyaku svāmi sākṣi śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1078 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
